en: This is the book of the generations of Adam. When God created man, he made him in the likeness of God.
zh: 以下是亞當後代的記錄。 神創造人的時候，是按著自己的樣式造的；

en: Male and female he created them, and he blessed them and named them Man when they were created.
zh: 他創造了一男一女。在創造他們的時候， 神賜福給他們，稱他們為人。

en: When Adam had lived 130 years, he fathered a son in his own likeness, after his image, and named him Seth.
zh: 亞當一百三十歲的時候，生了一個兒子，樣式和形象都和自己相似，就給他起名叫塞特。

en: The days of Adam after he fathered Seth were 800 years; and he had other sons and daughters.
zh: 亞當生塞特以後，還活了八百年，並且生了其他的兒女。

en: Thus all the days that Adam lived were 930 years, and he died.
zh: 亞當共活了九百三十歲，就死了。

en: When Seth had lived 105 years, he fathered Enosh.
zh: 塞特一百零五歲的時候，生了以挪士。

en: Seth lived after he fathered Enosh 807 years and had other sons and daughters.
zh: 塞特生以挪士以後，還活了八百零七年，並且生了其他的兒女。

en: Thus all the days of Seth were 912 years, and he died.
zh: 塞特共活了九百一十二歲，就死了。

en: When Enosh had lived 90 years, he fathered Kenan.
zh: 以挪士九十歲的時候，生了該南。

en: Enosh lived after he fathered Kenan 815 years and had other sons and daughters.
zh: 以挪士生該南以後，還活了八百一十五年，並且生了其他的兒女。

en: Thus all the days of Enosh were 905 years, and he died.
zh: 以挪士共活了九百零五歲，就死了。

en: When Kenan had lived 70 years, he fathered Mahalalel.
zh: 該南七十歲的時候，生了瑪勒列。

en: Kenan lived after he fathered Mahalalel 840 years and had other sons and daughters.
zh: 該南生瑪勒列以後，還活了八百四十年，並且生了其他的兒女。

en: Thus all the days of Kenan were 910 years, and he died.
zh: 該南共活了九百一十歲，就死了。

en: When Mahalalel had lived 65 years, he fathered Jared.
zh: 瑪勒列六十五歲的時候，生了雅列。

en: Mahalalel lived after he fathered Jared 830 years and had other sons and daughters.
zh: 瑪勒列生雅列以後，還活了八百三十年，並且生了其他的兒女。

en: Thus all the days of Mahalalel were 895 years, and he died.
zh: 瑪勒列共活了八百九十五歲，就死了。

en: When Jared had lived 162 years he fathered Enoch.
zh: 雅列一百六十二歲的時候，生了以諾。

en: Jared lived after he fathered Enoch 800 years and had other sons and daughters.
zh: 雅列生以諾以後，還活了八百年，並且生了其他的兒女。

en: Thus all the days of Jared were 962 years, and he died.
zh: 雅列共活了九百六十二歲，就死了。

en: When Enoch had lived 65 years, he fathered Methuselah.
zh: 以諾六十五歲的時候，生了瑪土撒拉。

en: Enoch walked with God after he fathered Methuselah 300 years and had other sons and daughters.
zh: 以諾生瑪土撒拉以後，和 神同行三百年，並且生了其他的兒女。

en: Thus all the days of Enoch were 365 years.
zh: 以諾共活了三百六十五歲。

en: Enoch walked with God, and he was not, for God took him.
zh: 以諾和 神同行，所以 神把他取去，他就不在了。

en: When Methuselah had lived 187 years, he fathered Lamech.
zh: 瑪土撒拉一百八十七歲的時候，生了拉麥。

en: Methuselah lived after he fathered Lamech 782 years and had other sons and daughters.
zh: 瑪土撒拉生拉麥以後，還活了七百八十二年，並且生了其他的兒女。

en: Thus all the days of Methuselah were 969 years, and he died.
zh: 瑪土撒拉共活了九百六十九歲，就死了。

en: When Lamech had lived 122 years, he fathered a son
zh: 拉麥一百八十二歲的時候，生了一個兒子，

en: and called his name Noah, saying, "Out of the ground that the LORD has cursed this one shall bring us relief from our work and from the painful toil of our hands."
zh: 就給他起名叫挪亞，說：“這兒子必使我們從地上的操作和手中的勞苦得著安慰，因為耶和華曾經咒詛這地。”

en: Lamech lived after he fathered Noah 595 years and had other sons and daughters.
zh: 拉麥生挪亞以後，還活了五百九十五年，並且生了其他的兒女。

en: Thus all the days of Lamech were 777 years, and he died.
zh: 拉麥共活了七百七十七歲，就死了。

en: After Noah was 500 years old, Noah fathered Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
zh: 挪亞五百歲的時候，就生了閃、含和雅弗。
